blockers.description: 20-02 Task 3 requires accepting the Hugging Face Llama-Prompt-Guard-2 gated-model license + running `huggingface-cli login`. This is a human-only web action; Claude cannot do it. The phase cannot complete past this gate autonomously.
blockers.workaround: Do all of 20-02's CODE automation (Tasks 2, 4, and Task 3's install-subcommand + web softening) first; the gate only blocks the final live-bootstrap verification + e2e.

human_actions_pending.context: 20-02 Task 3 blocking human-verify checkpoint (gated 22M PromptGuard model).

decisions.decision: Execute Phase 20 inline on main (no subagents), per-task atomic commits, hand-managed STATE/ROADMAP
decisions.rationale: use_worktrees=false serializes anyway; web honesty steps need pnpm (subagents lack it); SDK phase-resolver corrupts STATE frontmatter (documented caveat).

decisions.decision: Wrote the embedded sidecar Python in FINAL form (AF_INET + per-launch token) during Task 1
decisions.rationale: avoid rewriting the same file twice across Task 1/2; Go side still on unix/pipe until Task 2 wires TCP — harmless (Python not compiled by Go; e2e is CI-only).

decisions.decision: Windows Kernel-File: kept event 12=Create(open) as EventFileAccess alongside 15=Read; only 14=Close excluded
decisions.rationale: dropping 12 would silently narrow Windows credential detection (regression). Acceptance (15->access, 16/30/27->write, comment fixed) still met. Documented in 20-04-SUMMARY.

decisions.decision: macOS create stays EventFileAccess (path union fixed); only write/rename -> EventFileWrite
decisions.rationale: plan contract: existing create/open/network kinds unaffected. Subscription lives in eslogger.go (plan named non-existent collector.go).

next_action: Resume 20-02 Task 2 (IPC TCP+token). Read internal/llamafirewall/client.go + client_windows.go + supervisor.go (already analyzed) and rework to one TCP Dial(addr,token,timeout); collapse the named-pipe fork; supervisor picks a free 127.0.0.1 port + crypto/rand token + injects HF_HOME via cmd.Env; replace os.Stat readiness with TCP dial-retry; persist port+token to state.json; fix main.go $HOME->platform paths + audit-record dial; then rework the two supervisor test files to the new signatures. Full detail in memory/phase20-execution-progress.md.

All committed, every gate green (go build ./... + 3 GOOS cross-builds + go test + go vet + targeted tests). ROADMAP progress row = 4/6 (counts completed PLANs). The biggest remaining surface is 20-02 Task 2's rework of the 280-line //go:build linux supervisor_test.go from unix-socket mocks to TCP. 20-05 is fully unblocked and can be done independently of 20-02 if you prefer to defer the LlamaFirewall IPC rework. memory/phase20-execution-progress.md has the exhaustive per-task state + commit map.
